message:
feat(E4.F2.T2): add deterministic fixture and replay corpus tests (44 tests)

RecorderFixture envelope with FNV-1a checksum pinning, schema versioning,
and load/validate helpers. Six fixture types: normal 100-event, duplicate
batch IDs, corrupt torn record, mixed payload types, migration manifest,
and 10K-event perf corpus. Tests cover loading, checksum tamper detection,
dedup, corrupt recovery, serde roundtrip, and AppendLog ingest.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
